name: marp-template-cours-techniques
description: Template Marp reutilisable pour supports de cours techniques.

scripts.preview: npm run render && marp -s build --theme themes/coubiac.css
scripts.export:html: npm run render && marp build/examples/template-demo.md --theme themes/coubiac.css --html --allow-local-files -o dist/template-demo.html
scripts.export:pdf: npm run render && marp build/examples/template-demo.md --theme themes/coubiac.css --pdf --allow-local-files --browser chrome -o dist/template-demo.pdf
scripts.export:all: npm run export:html && npm run export:pdf
